mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT g.group_id, g.group_name, g.creator_id, g.created_at FROM groups g JOIN group_members gm ON g.group_id = gm.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO groups (group_name, creator_id, created_at) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{creatorId}, #{createdAt,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler})
INSERT INTO group_members (group_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{creatorId}, 2, #{joinedAt,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler})
INSERT INTO group_members (group_id, user_id, role, joined_at) VALUES (#{groupId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{joinedAt,typeHandler=com.example.chatterserver.mapper.typehandler.LocalDateTimeTypeHandler})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM group_members WHERE group_id = #{groupId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT u.user_id, u.username, u.password, u.nickname, u.avatar_url, u.status, u.last_heartbeat, u.created_at, u.last_login FROM users u JOIN group_members gm ON u.user_id = gm.user_id WHERE gm.group_id = #{groupId}
SELECT message_id, sender_id, receiver_id, group_id, message_type, content, status, created_at FROM messages WHERE group_id = #{groupId} ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT m.message_id, m.sender_id, m.receiver_id, m.group_id, m.message_type, m.content, m.status, m.created_at FROM messages m JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = m.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at ASC
SELECT g.group_id, g.group_name, g.creator_id, g.created_at FROM groups g JOIN group_members gm ON gm.group_id = g.group_id WHERE gm.user_id = #{userId}
